text: SFURTI (Scheme of Fund for Regeneration of Traditional Industries) Objective: Organize traditional industries and artisans into clusters to enhance competitiveness and productivity. Eligibility: NGOs, Central/State institutions, Semi-Govt, PRIs, and SPVs. Clusters involve ~500 beneficiary families in traditional sectors like Khadi and Coir. Benefits: Financial assistance for hard interventions (machinery, CFCs) and soft interventions (training, design). Application: Online via SFURTI Portal (https://sfurti.msme.gov.in/).

National SC-ST Hub (NSSH) Objective: Provide professional support to SC/ST entrepreneurs to fulfill public procurement mandates. Eligibility: SC/ST owned MSMEs registered on Udyam. Benefits: Capacity building, training, credit-linked subsidies, Special Marketing Assistance, and reimbursement of testing/certification fees. Application: Online via NSSH portal (https://www.scsthub.in/) or NSIC offices.

MSME Innovative Scheme Objective: Support MSMEs in innovation, intellectual property (IP), and design interventions. Eligibility: Registered MSMEs; some components open to individual innovators. Benefits: Grants for incubation, design support, and IP protection (patents/trademarks). Application: Online via MSME Innovative Portal (https://innovative.msme.gov.in/).

MSME Sustainable ZED Certification Objective: Encourage 'Zero Defect, Zero Effect' manufacturing. Eligibility: Manufacturing MSMEs registered on Udyam. Benefits: Subsidies on certification costs (Bronze, Silver, Gold), tech upgradation assistance, and consulting. Extra subsidies for women/SC/ST entrepreneurs. Application: Take ZED Pledge and apply via ZED Portal (https://zed.msme.gov.in/).
